- Explain the user-visible or release-facing change

## Checks

- [ ] `python -m compileall app`
- [ ] `node --check web/js/app.js`
- [ ] `make release-bundle`
- [ ] `make verify-release`
- [ ] `make github-repo`
- [ ] `make verify-github`

## Notes

- Mention config, deployment, or compatibility impacts if any
